artifacts.purpose: Simulation inputs, search method, seed sets, acceptance criteria, and run command.
Current search status, candidate count, simulation count, incumbent, elapsed time, ETA, and error state.
Candidate-level completed/total units, percent, ETA, throughput, objective, uncertainty, baseline gap, feasibility, and incumbent history.
Candidate policies, parameters, and repair or projection metadata.
Fresh-seed evaluation, confidence intervals, baseline comparisons, and final selection report.
Optional sampled trajectory summaries for diagnostics and reproducibility.
